name: Cranberry Bran Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 12 large muffin cups or line with paper baking cups.
2. In a bowl, combine the egg, mashed banana, milk, brown sugar, and oil. Stir in the cereal until well mixed; let stand to soften.
3. In another bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients (except cranberry sauce), stirring just to moisten.
4. Spoon half of this batter into each muffin cup. Top with 1 tablespoon of cranberry sauce.
5. Spoon the remaining batter over the top of the cranberries in each muffin cup.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
8. Store in an airtight container. Makes 12 large muffins.
